## FacetsXEvents.UserClickedASimpleFilter property

The user has clicked a filter which is of simple type. Payload: The clicked filter.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
UserClickedASimpleFilter: SimpleFilter;
```

## Remarks

This event does not imply changing the selection state of the filter. Business logic can prevent the filter from changing its state.
